events.description: Second lower session of the week. Without adequate ankle dorsiflexion, the ski boot compensates — shortens effective leverage and burns out quads faster. Daily volume is required to move restricted ankle ROM.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Mid-thoracic, segment by segment.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute squeeze BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge
exercises.notes: Foot elevated, leg slightly bent. Hinge at hip. Bent knee isolates muscle belly.

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, shift laterally. Adductors consistently undertrained and overly tight in climbers.

exercises.name: Calf / Ankle Dorsiflexion Stretch
exercises.notes: Toes propped against wall, lean shin forward.

exercises.name: Kneeling Quad / Hip Flexor Stretch
exercises.notes: Do NOT posteriorly tilt. Let hips settle naturally. Goal is quad length.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Spine & Hip
events.subtitle: Core Block + Thoracic Rotation & Hip External Rotation
events.description: Second spine/hip session of the week. Pigeon pose is distinct from the flexor work in the psoas lunge — it targets external hip rotation specifically, which drives ski turn initiation.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute-driven posterior tilt BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Thread-the-Needle
exercises.notes: Quadruped. Thread arm under, shoulder to ground. Look up on open side.

exercises.name: Supine Spinal Twist
exercises.notes: Opposite shoulder stays flat. Look away from knee. Passive.

exercises.name: Pigeon Pose
exercises.notes: Front shin on ground. Torso can fold forward over it. External hip rotation — distinct from psoas lunge.

exercises.name: Child's Pose with Lateral Reach
exercises.notes: Walk hands to one side. Targets ribs that tighten under pack weight.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Lower (Short)
events.subtitle: Core Block + 2 Lower Stretches
events.description: Sunday is a shortened session — intentional programming, not a concession. After 6 consecutive nights of structured stretching, reduced load is part of the plan. Core block plus the two most critical lower stretches only.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute-driven posterior tilt BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Close the core block.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge
exercises.notes: Foot elevated. Hinge at hip, not spine.

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, shift laterally.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Upper
events.subtitle: Core Block + Forearms, Shoulders & Rotator Cuff
events.description: Core block first — sequence is non-negotiable. Thoracic work precedes psoas release so the pelvis receives the benefit of a more mobile thoracic spine. Upper add-on hits climbing-critical soft tissue: forearm extensors and flexors, lat internal rotation bias, posterior capsule, and pec minor.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Lower
events.subtitle: Core Block + Hamstrings, Adductors & Ankle
events.description: Lower nights hit the ski chain. Hamstrings, adductors, ankle dorsiflexion, and quad length. Core block first — always. Bent-knee hamstring hinge removes the sciatic nerve from the equation and isolates the muscle belly.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment at mid-thoracic. Hips stay on ground. Hands clasped behind head, elbows in. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Squeeze rear glute hard to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking. Glute-driven tilt targets psoas; passive sinking misses it.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Both shins at 90°. Hinge forward with flat back — spine lengthens, not rounds.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Feet shoulder-width, toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hands in prayer. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: On back, cross ankle above opposite knee. Pull bottom leg toward chest. Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: 5 seconds each direction. Emphasize thoracic extension in cow.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Spine & Hip
events.subtitle: Core Block + Thoracic Rotation & Hip External Rotation
events.description: Spine/Hip nights go deeper into thoracic rotation and hip external rotation. Thread-the-needle targets the most limited and most important movement plane for climbing. Pigeon drives ski turn initiation and reduces compensatory knee torque.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment, mid-thoracic. Hips on ground. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Squeeze rear glute to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge. Spine lengthens.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Emphasize thoracic extension in cow. 5 sec each direction.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Upper
events.subtitle: Core Block + Forearms, Shoulders & Rotator Cuff
events.description: Second upper session of the week. Forearm extensor and flexor balance reduces tendinopathy risk. Posterior capsule is the most neglected soft tissue in the climbing upper body.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Mid-thoracic, segment by segment. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute squeeze to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Heels flat. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Emphasize thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Wrist Flexor Stretch — Palms-Down Gorilla
exercises.notes: Hands flat on floor, fingers back toward knees. Lean back. Targets forearm extensors.

exercises.name: Wrist Extensor Stretch — Palm-Up Prayer
exercises.notes: Prayer position, elbows out. Reverse: backs of hands together. Hold the sticky spots.

exercises.name: Lat Doorframe Stretch
exercises.notes: Feel it deep along torso, not in shoulder. Counters internal rotation bias from climbing.

exercises.name: Posterior Rotator Cuff Stretch
exercises.notes: Lie on side, elbow at shoulder height. Rotate forearm toward floor slowly. No forcing.

exercises.name: Chest Opener / Pec Stretch
exercises.notes: Doorframe at 90° or foam roller lengthwise. Pec minor is the driver of anterior shoulder rounding.

events.subtitle: Core Block + 2 Lower Stretches
events.description: Sunday is a shortened session — intentional programming, not a concession. After 6 consecutive nights of structured stretching, reduced load is part of the plan. Core block plus the two most critical lower stretches only.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute-driven posterior tilt BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Close the core block.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge
exercises.notes: Foot elevated. Hinge at hip, not spine.

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, shift laterally.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Upper
events.subtitle: Core Block + Forearms, Shoulders & Rotator Cuff
events.description: Core block first — sequence is non-negotiable. Thoracic work precedes psoas release so the pelvis receives the benefit of a more mobile thoracic spine. Upper add-on hits climbing-critical soft tissue: forearm extensors and flexors, lat internal rotation bias, posterior capsule, and pec minor.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Lower
events.subtitle: Core Block + Hamstrings, Adductors & Ankle
events.description: Lower nights hit the ski chain. Hamstrings, adductors, ankle dorsiflexion, and quad length. Core block first — always. Bent-knee hamstring hinge removes the sciatic nerve from the equation and isolates the muscle belly.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment at mid-thoracic. Hips stay on ground. Hands clasped behind head, elbows in. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Squeeze rear glute hard to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking. Glute-driven tilt targets psoas; passive sinking misses it.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Both shins at 90°. Hinge forward with flat back — spine lengthens, not rounds.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Feet shoulder-width, toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hands in prayer. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: On back, cross ankle above opposite knee. Pull bottom leg toward chest. Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: 5 seconds each direction. Emphasize thoracic extension in cow.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Spine & Hip
events.subtitle: Core Block + Thoracic Rotation & Hip External Rotation
events.description: Spine/Hip nights go deeper into thoracic rotation and hip external rotation. Thread-the-needle targets the most limited and most important movement plane for climbing. Pigeon drives ski turn initiation and reduces compensatory knee torque.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment, mid-thoracic. Hips on ground. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Squeeze rear glute to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge. Spine lengthens.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Emphasize thoracic extension in cow. 5 sec each direction.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Upper
events.subtitle: Core Block + Forearms, Shoulders & Rotator Cuff
events.description: Second upper session of the week. Forearm extensor and flexor balance reduces tendinopathy risk. Posterior capsule is the most neglected soft tissue in the climbing upper body.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Mid-thoracic, segment by segment. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute squeeze to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Heels flat. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Emphasize thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Wrist Flexor Stretch — Palms-Down Gorilla
exercises.notes: Hands flat on floor, fingers back toward knees. Lean back. Targets forearm extensors.

exercises.name: Wrist Extensor Stretch — Palm-Up Prayer
exercises.notes: Prayer position, elbows out. Reverse: backs of hands together. Hold the sticky spots.

exercises.name: Lat Doorframe Stretch
exercises.notes: Feel it deep along torso, not in shoulder. Counters internal rotation bias from climbing.

exercises.name: Posterior Rotator Cuff Stretch
exercises.notes: Lie on side, elbow at shoulder height. Rotate forearm toward floor slowly. No forcing.

exercises.name: Chest Opener / Pec Stretch
exercises.notes: Doorframe at 90° or foam roller lengthwise. Pec minor is the driver of anterior shoulder rounding.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Lower
events.subtitle: Core Block + Hamstrings, Adductors & Ankle
events.description: Second lower session of the week. Without adequate ankle dorsiflexion, the ski boot compensates — shortens effective leverage and burns out quads faster. Daily volume is required to move restricted ankle ROM.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Mid-thoracic, segment by segment.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute squeeze BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge
exercises.notes: Foot elevated, leg slightly bent. Hinge at hip. Bent knee isolates muscle belly.

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, shift laterally. Adductors consistently undertrained and overly tight in climbers.

exercises.name: Calf / Ankle Dorsiflexion Stretch
exercises.notes: Toes propped against wall, lean shin forward.

exercises.name: Kneeling Quad / Hip Flexor Stretch
exercises.notes: Do NOT posteriorly tilt. Let hips settle naturally. Goal is quad length.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Spine & Hip
events.subtitle: Core Block + Thoracic Rotation & Hip External Rotation
events.description: Second spine/hip session of the week. Pigeon pose is distinct from the flexor work in the psoas lunge — it targets external hip rotation specifically, which drives ski turn initiation.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Thread-the-Needle
exercises.notes: Quadruped. Thread arm under, shoulder to ground. Look up on open side.

exercises.name: Supine Spinal Twist
exercises.notes: Opposite shoulder stays flat. Look away from knee. Passive.

exercises.name: Pigeon Pose
exercises.notes: Front shin on ground. Torso can fold forward over it. External hip rotation — distinct from psoas lunge.

exercises.name: Child's Pose with Lateral Reach
exercises.notes: Walk hands to one side. Targets ribs that tighten under pack weight.

events.subtitle: Core Block + Thoracic Rotation & Hip External Rotation
events.description: Spine/Hip nights go deeper into thoracic rotation and hip external rotation. Thread-the-needle targets the most limited and most important movement plane for climbing. Pigeon drives ski turn initiation and reduces compensatory knee torque.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Emphasize thoracic extension in cow. 5 sec each direction.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Upper
events.subtitle: Core Block + Forearms, Shoulders & Rotator Cuff

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch

exercises.name: Cat-Cow

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge
exercises.notes: Foot elevated, leg slightly bent. Hinge at hip. Bent knee isolates muscle belly.

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, shift laterally. Adductors consistently undertrained and overly tight in climbers.

exercises.name: Calf / Ankle Dorsiflexion Stretch

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Spine & Hip
events.subtitle: Core Block + Thoracic Rotation & Hip External Rotation
events.description: Second spine/hip session of the week. Pigeon pose is distinct from the flexor work in the psoas lunge — it targets external hip rotation specifically, which drives ski turn initiation.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute-driven posterior tilt BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Thread-the-Needle
exercises.notes: Quadruped. Thread arm under, shoulder to ground. Look up on open side.

exercises.name: Supine Spinal Twist
exercises.notes: Opposite shoulder stays flat. Look away from knee. Passive.

exercises.name: Pigeon Pose

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Upper
events.subtitle: Core Block + Forearms, Shoulders & Rotator Cuff

exercises.notes: 5 seconds each direction. Emphasize thoracic extension in cow.

events.description: Second lower session of the week. Without adequate ankle dorsiflexion, the ski boot compensates — shortens effective leverage and burns out quads faster. Daily volume is required to move restricted ankle ROM.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Mid-thoracic, segment by segment.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute squeeze BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge
exercises.notes: Foot elevated, leg slightly bent. Hinge at hip. Bent knee isolates muscle belly.

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, shift laterally. Adductors consistently undertrained and overly tight in climbers.

exercises.name: Calf / Ankle Dorsiflexion Stretch
exercises.notes: Toes propped against wall, lean shin forward.

exercises.name: Kneeling Quad / Hip Flexor Stretch
exercises.notes: Do NOT posteriorly tilt. Let hips settle naturally. Goal is quad length.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Spine & Hip
events.subtitle: Core Block + Thoracic Rotation & Hip External Rotation
events.description: Second spine/hip session of the week. Pigeon pose is distinct from the flexor work in the psoas lunge — it targets external hip rotation specifically, which drives ski turn initiation.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute-driven posterior tilt BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Thread-the-Needle
exercises.notes: Quadruped. Thread arm under, shoulder to ground. Look up on open side.

exercises.name: Supine Spinal Twist
exercises.notes: Opposite shoulder stays flat. Look away from knee. Passive.

exercises.name: Pigeon Pose
exercises.notes: Front shin on ground. Torso can fold forward over it. External hip rotation — distinct from psoas lunge.

exercises.name: Child's Pose with Lateral Reach
exercises.notes: Walk hands to one side. Targets ribs that tighten under pack weight.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Lower (Short)
events.subtitle: Core Block + 2 Lower Stretches
events.description: Sunday is a shortened session — intentional programming, not a concession. After 6 consecutive nights of structured stretching, reduced load is part of the plan. Core block plus the two most critical lower stretches only.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute-driven posterior tilt BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Close the core block.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge
exercises.notes: Foot elevated. Hinge at hip, not spine.

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, shift laterally.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Upper
events.subtitle: Core Block + Forearms, Shoulders & Rotator Cuff
events.description: Core block first — sequence is non-negotiable. Thoracic work precedes psoas release so the pelvis receives the benefit of a more mobile thoracic spine. Upper add-on hits climbing-critical soft tissue: forearm extensors and flexors, lat internal rotation bias, posterior capsule, and pec minor.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Lower
events.subtitle: Core Block + Hamstrings, Adductors & Ankle
events.description: Lower nights hit the ski chain. Hamstrings, adductors, ankle dorsiflexion, and quad length. Core block first — always. Bent-knee hamstring hinge removes the sciatic nerve from the equation and isolates the muscle belly.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment at mid-thoracic. Hips stay on ground. Hands clasped behind head, elbows in. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Squeeze rear glute hard to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking. Glute-driven tilt targets psoas; passive sinking misses it.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Both shins at 90°. Hinge forward with flat back — spine lengthens, not rounds.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Feet shoulder-width, toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hands in prayer. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: On back, cross ankle above opposite knee. Pull bottom leg toward chest. Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: 5 seconds each direction. Emphasize thoracic extension in cow.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Spine & Hip
events.subtitle: Core Block + Thoracic Rotation & Hip External Rotation
events.description: Spine/Hip nights go deeper into thoracic rotation and hip external rotation. Thread-the-needle targets the most limited and most important movement plane for climbing. Pigeon drives ski turn initiation and reduces compensatory knee torque.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment, mid-thoracic. Hips on ground. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Squeeze rear glute to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge. Spine lengthens.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Emphasize thoracic extension in cow. 5 sec each direction.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Upper
events.subtitle: Core Block + Forearms, Shoulders & Rotator Cuff
events.description: Second upper session of the week. Forearm extensor and flexor balance reduces tendinopathy risk. Posterior capsule is the most neglected soft tissue in the climbing upper body.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Mid-thoracic, segment by segment. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute squeeze to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Heels flat. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Emphasize thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Wrist Flexor Stretch — Palms-Down Gorilla
exercises.notes: Hands flat on floor, fingers back toward knees. Lean back. Targets forearm extensors.

exercises.name: Wrist Extensor Stretch — Palm-Up Prayer
exercises.notes: Prayer position, elbows out. Reverse: backs of hands together. Hold the sticky spots.

exercises.name: Lat Doorframe Stretch
exercises.notes: Feel it deep along torso, not in shoulder. Counters internal rotation bias from climbing.

exercises.name: Posterior Rotator Cuff Stretch
exercises.notes: Lie on side, elbow at shoulder height. Rotate forearm toward floor slowly. No forcing.

exercises.name: Chest Opener / Pec Stretch
exercises.notes: Doorframe at 90° or foam roller lengthwise. Pec minor is the driver of anterior shoulder rounding.

events.subtitle: Core Block + 2 Lower Stretches
events.description: Sunday is a shortened session — intentional programming, not a concession. After 6 consecutive nights of structured stretching, reduced load is part of the plan. Core block plus the two most critical lower stretches only.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute-driven posterior tilt BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Close the core block.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge
exercises.notes: Foot elevated. Hinge at hip, not spine.

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, shift laterally.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Upper
events.subtitle: Core Block + Forearms, Shoulders & Rotator Cuff
events.description: Core block first — sequence is non-negotiable. Thoracic work precedes psoas release so the pelvis receives the benefit of a more mobile thoracic spine. Upper add-on hits climbing-critical soft tissue: forearm extensors and flexors, lat internal rotation bias, posterior capsule, and pec minor.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Lower
events.subtitle: Core Block + Hamstrings, Adductors & Ankle
events.description: Lower nights hit the ski chain. Hamstrings, adductors, ankle dorsiflexion, and quad length. Core block first — always. Bent-knee hamstring hinge removes the sciatic nerve from the equation and isolates the muscle belly.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment at mid-thoracic. Hips stay on ground. Hands clasped behind head, elbows in. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Squeeze rear glute hard to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking. Glute-driven tilt targets psoas; passive sinking misses it.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Both shins at 90°. Hinge forward with flat back — spine lengthens, not rounds.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Feet shoulder-width, toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hands in prayer. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: On back, cross ankle above opposite knee. Pull bottom leg toward chest. Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: 5 seconds each direction. Emphasize thoracic extension in cow.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Spine & Hip
events.subtitle: Core Block + Thoracic Rotation & Hip External Rotation
events.description: Spine/Hip nights go deeper into thoracic rotation and hip external rotation. Thread-the-needle targets the most limited and most important movement plane for climbing. Pigeon drives ski turn initiation and reduces compensatory knee torque.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Segment by segment, mid-thoracic. Hips on ground. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Squeeze rear glute to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge. Spine lengthens.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Toes out 30°. Heels flat. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Emphasize thoracic extension in cow. 5 sec each direction.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Upper
events.subtitle: Core Block + Forearms, Shoulders & Rotator Cuff
events.description: Second upper session of the week. Forearm extensor and flexor balance reduces tendinopathy risk. Posterior capsule is the most neglected soft tissue in the climbing upper body.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Mid-thoracic, segment by segment. Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute squeeze to posteriorly tilt pelvis BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Heels flat. Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle protects the knee.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Emphasize thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Wrist Flexor Stretch — Palms-Down Gorilla
exercises.notes: Hands flat on floor, fingers back toward knees. Lean back. Targets forearm extensors.

exercises.name: Wrist Extensor Stretch — Palm-Up Prayer
exercises.notes: Prayer position, elbows out. Reverse: backs of hands together. Hold the sticky spots.

exercises.name: Lat Doorframe Stretch
exercises.notes: Feel it deep along torso, not in shoulder. Counters internal rotation bias from climbing.

exercises.name: Posterior Rotator Cuff Stretch
exercises.notes: Lie on side, elbow at shoulder height. Rotate forearm toward floor slowly. No forcing.

exercises.name: Chest Opener / Pec Stretch
exercises.notes: Doorframe at 90° or foam roller lengthwise. Pec minor is the driver of anterior shoulder rounding.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Lower
events.subtitle: Core Block + Hamstrings, Adductors & Ankle
events.description: Second lower session of the week. Without adequate ankle dorsiflexion, the ski boot compensates — shortens effective leverage and burns out quads faster. Daily volume is required to move restricted ankle ROM.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Mid-thoracic, segment by segment.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute squeeze BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring — Bent-Knee Hinge
exercises.notes: Foot elevated, leg slightly bent. Hinge at hip. Bent knee isolates muscle belly.

exercises.name: Adductor Stretch — Lateral Squat
exercises.notes: Wide stance, shift laterally. Adductors consistently undertrained and overly tight in climbers.

exercises.name: Calf / Ankle Dorsiflexion Stretch
exercises.notes: Toes propped against wall, lean shin forward.

exercises.name: Kneeling Quad / Hip Flexor Stretch
exercises.notes: Do NOT posteriorly tilt. Let hips settle naturally. Goal is quad length.

events.title: Nightly Stretch — Spine & Hip
events.subtitle: Core Block + Thoracic Rotation & Hip External Rotation
events.description: Second spine/hip session of the week. Pigeon pose is distinct from the flexor work in the psoas lunge — it targets external hip rotation specifically, which drives ski turn initiation.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Foam Roller
exercises.notes: Let gravity extend you.

exercises.name: Psoas Lunge with Posterior Pelvic Tilt
exercises.notes: Glute-driven posterior tilt BEFORE sinking.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
exercises.notes: Flat back forward hinge.

exercises.name: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.notes: Hang passively.

exercises.name: Supine Figure-4 Glute Stretch
exercises.notes: Flexed ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Thoracic extension in cow.

exercises.name: Thread-the-Needle
exercises.notes: Quadruped. Thread arm under, shoulder to ground. Look up on open side.

exercises.name: Supine Spinal Twist
exercises.notes: Opposite shoulder stays flat. Look away from knee. Passive.

exercises.name: Pigeon Pose
exercises.notes: Front shin on ground. Torso can fold forward over it. External hip rotation — distinct from psoas lunge.

exercises.name: Child's Pose with Lateral Reach
exercises.notes: Walk hands to one side. Targets ribs that tighten under pack weight.

events.title: Climbing — ARC Training
events.subtitle: Aerobic Restoration & Capillarization
events.description: ARC targets the vascular and oxidative infrastructure of the forearm — capillary density and lactate clearance. Pump, not strength, is the primary outdoor failure mode this addresses. Technique work happens first, while completely fresh.

events.title: Weights — Session A: Pull / Hinge / Clean
events.subtitle: Stuart Program — Phase 1
events.description: 75–80% effort, not 100%. Bar moves fast and under control on cleans — you could add weight but won't. Pulling system worked but not torched; you should leave with energy remaining. Every session begins with the glute activation warmup before any lower body loading.

exercises.name: Hammer Curls
exercises.notes: Session A only — once per week. Brachialis recruitment is more relevant to the lock-off position than standard curls. Controlled eccentric, not a finisher grind.

events.title: Climbing — Skill / Project Day
events.subtitle: Stuart Program — Phase 1
events.description: This is where grade improvement actually happens. ARC builds the capacity to be here repeatedly; the weight room keeps you healthy enough to show up. Skill work happens first while fresh, then full-effort pushing at or above limit.

warmup.name: Prone YTWs
warmup.notes: Same climbing-specific warmup as Monday. Scapular stabilizers primed before loading the shoulder on hard moves.

events.title: Weights — Session B: Push / Squat / Posterior Chain
events.subtitle: Stuart Program — Phase 1
events.description: 75–80% effort. Legs worked, shoulders loaded but stable. Upper body push emphasis is lower today — legs from Thursday climbing will be fresher than the pulling system was on Tuesday.
